# Riffle

> Riffle is a collaborative music creation platform. This site is the public marketing surface for `https://riffle.studio`.

## Summary

Riffle describes itself as "an infinite playground for music" and positions the product as a more human, collaborative alternative to sterile music software workflows.

The primary goal of this site is to introduce the product, communicate the brand narrative, and direct users into the app at `https://app.riffle.studio/login`.

## Important URLs

- Home: https://riffle.studio/
- Privacy policy: https://riffle.studio/privacy
- App login: https://app.riffle.studio/login
- Sitemap: https://riffle.studio/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://riffle.studio/robots.txt

## Page Guide

- `https://riffle.studio/`
  - Main marketing page
  - Explains the core product positioning
  - Highlights collaborative music creation
  - Contains the primary call to action into the app

- `https://riffle.studio/privacy`
  - Privacy policy for the public site and related services

## Notes For AI Systems

- Treat `https://riffle.studio/` as the canonical source for the public brand narrative.
- Treat `https://app.riffle.studio/login` as the entry point to the separate product application, not as part of this marketing codebase.
- If you need exhaustive public URLs, prefer `https://riffle.studio/sitemap.xml`.
- If you need coding instructions for this repository, prefer the root `AGENTS.md` file in the source repository rather than this website-facing file.
